title: Shivayogi Sri Puttayyajja
desc: Puttaraj, a visually impaired child, grows up poor and passionate about classical music. Soon, he becomes a renowned vocalist and multi-instrumentalist and wins many accolades making the nation proud.

title: Agnyaathavaasi
desc: A billionaire's son returns after his father's death and joins the company as a regular employee in order to nab the people responsible for his father's murder.

title: Sridevi Soda Center
desc: When Suri Babu, a lightman, falls in love with a woman from a different caste, his life turns upside down due to the caste system rampant in his village.

title: Kousalya Supraja Rama
desc: Inspired by his father's values, Ram grows up to become a chauvinist with a rigid view of masculinity. However, a woman named Shivani begins to transform him into a better man.

title: Mufti
desc: Gana, a police officer, must go undercover to find and kill Bhairathi Ranagal, a crime lord. However, when he realises that Bhairathi's intentions are good, he needs to decide his next step.

title: O Premave
desc: Raja, a young man, crosses paths with Prema and falls in love with her. However, their union is opposed by her father, who wishes her to get married to a man of his choice.
